title: lithocardium microphyllum
intro: Lithocardium microphyllum, also known as Digitalis purpurea, is a flowering plant species within the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its cardiac glycosides, which have been found to have a positive effect on the heart by increasing the strength of the heartbeat and reducing the symptoms of heart failure. The health benefits of lithocardium microphyllum include its ability to improve cardiac function, reduce the risk of heart failure, and lower blood pressure. Lithocardium microphyllum is commonly prepared as a tincture, capsule, or extract, and is used in herbal medicine to treat conditions such as atrial fibrillation and heart failure.
